tEn: Code Llama: Open Foundation Models for Code
tZh: Code Llama：用于代码的开放基础模型
sEn: Code Llama is a family of state-of-the-art open large language models for code, with specialized versions for Python and instruction following, supporting up to 100k tokens and infilling.
sZh: Code Llama 是一系列用于代码的先进开放大语言模型，包含 Python 专用版和指令跟随版，支持高达 10 万 token 的输入和填充功能。
absEn: We release Code Llama, a family of large language models for code based on Llama 2 providing state-of-the-art performance among open models, infilling capabilities, support for large input contexts, and zero-shot instruction following ability for programming tasks. We provide multiple flavors to cover a wide range of applications: foundation models (Code Llama), Python specializations (Code Llama - Python), and instruction-following models (Code Llama - Instruct) with 7B, 13B, 34B and 70B parameters each. All models are trained on sequences of 16k tokens and show improvements on inputs with up to 100k tokens. 7B, 13B and 70B Code Llama and Code Llama - Instruct variants support infilling based on surrounding content. Code Llama reaches state-of-the-art performance among open models on several code benchmarks, with scores of up to 67% and 65% on HumanEval and MBPP, respectively. Notably, Code Llama - Python 7B outperforms Llama 2 70B on HumanEval and MBPP, and all our models outperform every other publicly available model on MultiPL-E. We release Code Llama under a permissive license that allows for both research and commercial use.
absZh: 我们发布了 Code Llama，这是一个基于 Llama 2 的代码大语言模型家族，在开放模型中提供了最先进的性能，具备填充能力、支持大输入上下文以及零样本指令跟随能力，适用于编程任务。我们提供了多种版本以覆盖广泛的应用场景：基础模型（Code Llama）、Python 专用版（Code Llama - Python）和指令跟随模型（Code Llama - Instruct），每个版本分别有 7B、13B、34B 和 70B 参数。所有模型均在 16k token 的序列上训练，并在高达 100k token 的输入上表现出改进。7B、13B 和 70B 的 Code Llama 和 Code Llama - Instruct 变体支持基于周围内容的填充。Code Llama 在多个代码基准测试中达到了开放模型中的最先进性能，在 HumanEval 和 MBPP 上分别取得了高达 67% 和 65% 的分数。值得注意的是，Code Llama - Python 7B 在 HumanEval 和 MBPP 上超越了 Llama 2 70B，并且我们所有的模型在 MultiPL-E 上均优于其他所有公开可用的模型。我们以允许研究和商业使用的宽松许可证发布 Code Llama。

contrib.en: Releases Code Llama, a family of large language models for code based on Llama 2 with state-of-the-art performance among open models.
contrib.zh: 发布基于 Llama 2 的代码大语言模型系列 Code Llama，在开放模型中达到最先进性能。

contrib.en: Provides multiple variants: foundation models (Code Llama), Python specializations (Code Llama - Python), and instruction-following models (Code Llama - Instruct) in 7B, 13B, 34B, and 70B sizes.
contrib.zh: 提供多种变体：基础模型（Code Llama）、Python 专用模型（Code Llama - Python）和指令遵循模型（Code Llama - Instruct），参数规模为 7B、13B、34B 和 70B。

contrib.en: Supports infilling (fill-in-the-middle) for 7B, 13B, and 70B models, enabling code completion in IDEs.
contrib.zh: 支持 7B、13B 和 70B 模型的代码填充（中间填充）功能，可用于 IDE 中的代码补全。

contrib.en: Extends context length to 100K tokens via long context fine-tuning (LCFT) with modified RoPE base period.
contrib.zh: 通过修改 RoPE 基频的长上下文微调（LCFT），将上下文长度扩展到 100K 词元。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on HumanEval (67% pass@1) and MBPP (65% pass@1) among open models.
contrib.zh: 在 HumanEval（67% pass@1）和 MBPP（65% pass@1）上达到开放模型中的最先进结果。

contrib.en: Code Llama - Python 7B outperforms Llama 2 70B on HumanEval and MBPP, and all models surpass other public models on MultiPL-E.
contrib.zh: Code Llama - Python 7B 在 HumanEval 和 MBPP 上超越 Llama 2 70B，所有模型在 MultiPL-E 上超越其他公开模型。

limits.en: Infilling and long context fine-tuning slightly degrade performance on standard short-sequence benchmarks like HumanEval and MBPP.
limits.zh: 填充和长上下文微调在标准短序列基准（如 HumanEval 和 MBPP）上略微降低性能。

limits.en: The 34B model lacks infilling capability, limiting its use in real-time code completion scenarios.
limits.zh: 34B 模型缺乏填充能力，限制了其在实时代码补全场景中的应用。

limits.en: Long context fine-tuning reduces performance on short prompts (under 4K tokens) by up to 2 BLEU points.
limits.zh: 长上下文微调在短提示（低于 4K 词元）上性能下降最多 2 个 BLEU 点。

limits.en: Safety evaluations rely on automatic benchmarks and limited red teaming, which may not capture all risks.
limits.zh: 安全评估依赖自动基准和有限的红队测试，可能无法覆盖所有风险。

limits.en: Instruction fine-tuning may cause over-refusal or false refusals on benign prompts, as noted in red teaming.
limits.zh: 指令微调可能导致对良性提示的过度拒绝或错误拒绝，红队测试已指出此问题。

items.en: We release Code Llama, a family of large language models for code based on Llama 2 providing state-of-the-art performance among open models, infilling capabilities, support for large input contexts, and zero-shot instruction following ability for programming tasks. We provide multiple flavors to cover a wide range of applications: foundation models (Code Llama), Python specializations (Code Llama - Python), and instruction-following models (Code Llama - Instruct) with 7B, 13B, 34B, and 70B parameters each. These models are trained on sequences of 16k tokens and show improvements on inputs with up to 100k tokens. The 7B, 13B and 70B Code Llama and Code Llama - Instruct variants support infilling based on surrounding content. Code Llama reaches state-of-the-art performance among open models on several code benchmarks, with scores of up to 67% and 65% on HumanEval and MBPP, respectively. Notably, Code Llama - Python 7B outperforms Llama 2 70B on HumanEval and MBPP, and all our models outperform every other publicly available model on MultiPL-E. We release Code Llama under a permissive license that allows for both research and commercial use.111 https://github.com/facebookresearch/codellama
items.zh: 我们发布了 Code Llama，这是一个基于 Llama 2 的代码大型语言模型家族，在开放模型中提供了最先进的性能、填充能力、对大输入上下文的支持以及编程任务的零样本指令遵循能力。我们提供了多种版本以覆盖广泛的应用：基础模型（Code Llama）、Python 专用模型（Code Llama - Python）和指令遵循模型（Code Llama - Instruct），分别有 7B、13B、34B 和 70B 参数。这些模型在 16k 令牌的序列上训练，并在多达 100k 令牌的输入上显示出改进。7B、13B 和 70B 的 Code Llama 和 Code Llama - Instruct 变体支持基于周围内容的填充。Code Llama 在多个代码基准测试中达到了开放模型中的最先进性能，在 HumanEval 和 MBPP 上分别获得了高达 67% 和 65% 的分数。值得注意的是，Code Llama - Python 7B 在 HumanEval 和 MBPP 上优于 Llama 2 70B，并且我们所有的模型在 MultiPL-E 上都优于其他所有公开可用的模型。我们在允许研究和商业使用的宽松许可下发布了 Code Llama。111 https://github.com/facebookresearch/codellama

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) power a rapidly increasing number of applications, having reached a proficiency in natural language that allows them to be commanded and prompted to perform a variety of tasks (OpenAI, 2023; Touvron et al., 2023b). By utilizing large, in-domain datasets, their efficacy can be greatly improved for applications that require a combination of both natural and domain-specific language and understanding of specialized terminology. By training on domain-specific datasets, they have proved effective more broadly on applications that require advanced natural language understanding. A prominent use-case is the formal interaction with computer systems, such as program synthesis from natural language specifications, code completion, debugging, and generating documentation (for a survey, see Xu & Zhu, 2022, also see Section 5). In this work, we present Code Llama, a family of LLMs for code generation and infilling derived from Llama 2 (Touvron et al., 2023b) and released under the same custom permissive license. We provide inference code for both completion and infilling models in the accompanying repository.11footnotemark: 1 Our approach is based on gradually specializing and increasing the capabilities of Llama 2 models by applying a cascade of training and fine-tuning steps (Figure 2): 00footnotetext: ††\dagger: Core contributors. ∗∗\ast: Meta AI, CERMICS École des Ponts ParisTech. ⋄⋄\diamond: Meta AI & Hebrew University of Jerusalem
items.zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）驱动着越来越多的应用，它们在自然语言方面达到了熟练程度，可以被命令和提示以执行各种任务（OpenAI, 2023; Touvron et al., 2023b）。通过利用大型领域内数据集，对于需要自然语言和领域特定语言结合以及理解专业术语的应用，它们的效能可以大大提高。通过在领域特定数据集上训练，它们已被证明在需要高级自然语言理解的应用中更广泛地有效。一个突出的用例是与计算机系统的正式交互，例如从自然语言规范进行程序合成、代码补全、调试和生成文档（有关调查，请参见 Xu & Zhu, 2022，另见第 5 节）。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Code Llama，这是一个用于代码生成和填充的 LLM 家族，源自 Llama 2（Touvron et al., 2023b），并在相同的自定义宽松许可下发布。我们在随附的仓库中提供了用于补全和填充模型的推理代码。11footnotemark: 1 我们的方法基于通过应用一系列训练和微调步骤（图 2）逐步专业化并增强 Llama 2 模型的能力：00footnotetext: ††\dagger: 核心贡献者。∗∗\ast: Meta AI, CERMICS École des Ponts ParisTech。⋄⋄\diamond: Meta AI & 耶路撒冷希伯来大学

items.en: Code-training from foundation models. While most LLMs for code generation such as AlphaCode (Li et al., 2022), InCoder (Fried et al., 2023) or StarCoder (Li et al., 2023) are trained on code only, Codex (Chen et al., 2021) was fine-tuned from a general language model. We also start from a foundation model (Llama 2, Touvron et al., 2023b) pretrained on general-purpose text and code data. Our comparison (Section 3.4.1) shows that initializing our model with Llama 2 outperforms the same architecture trained on code only for a given budget.
items.zh: 从基础模型进行代码训练。虽然大多数用于代码生成的 LLM，如 AlphaCode（Li et al., 2022）、InCoder（Fried et al., 2023）或 StarCoder（Li et al., 2023），仅在代码上训练，但 Codex（Chen et al., 2021）是从通用语言模型微调而来。我们也从一个在通用文本和代码数据上预训练的基础模型（Llama 2, Touvron et al., 2023b）开始。我们的比较（第 3.4.1 节）表明，在给定预算下，用 Llama 2 初始化我们的模型优于仅在代码上训练的相同架构。

items.en: Infilling. Autoregressive training and fine-tuning of LLMs is suitable for prompt completion, but does not provide the capability to fill a missing portion of text while taking the full surrounding context into account. Our code-training for 7B, 13B and 70B Code Llama models features a multitask objective (Fried et al., 2023) consisting of both autoregressive and causal infilling prediction, enabling applications such as real-time completion in source code editors or docstring generation.
items.zh: 填充。LLM 的自回归训练和微调适用于提示补全，但不提供在考虑完整周围上下文的情况下填充文本缺失部分的能力。我们对 7B、13B 和 70B Code Llama 模型的代码训练采用了多任务目标（Fried et al., 2023），包括自回归和因果填充预测，从而支持诸如源代码编辑器中的实时补全或文档字符串生成等应用。

items.en: Long input contexts. Unlocking repository-level reasoning for completion or synthesis – as opposed to function-level or file-level – requires prompting the model with much longer context than the 4,096 tokens supported by Llama 2. We propose an additional fine-tuning stage that extends the maximum context length from 4,096 tokens to 100,000 tokens by modifying the parameters of the RoPE positional embeddings (Su et al., 2021) used in Llama 2. Our experiments show Code Llama operating on very large contexts with a moderate impact on performances on standard coding benchmarks (Section 3.3).
items.zh: 长输入上下文。解锁仓库级别的推理以进行补全或合成——而不是函数级别或文件级别——需要用比 Llama 2 支持的 4,096 令牌长得多的上下文来提示模型。我们提出了一个额外的微调阶段，通过修改 Llama 2 中使用的 RoPE 位置嵌入（Su et al., 2021）的参数，将最大上下文长度从 4,096 令牌扩展到 100,000 令牌。我们的实验表明，Code Llama 在非常大的上下文上运行，对标准编码基准测试的性能影响适中（第 3.3 节）。

items.en: Instruction fine-tuning. For end-users, the utility of LLMs is significantly improved by instruction fine-tuning (Ouyang et al., 2022; Wei et al., 2022; OpenAI, 2023; Touvron et al., 2023b), which also helps preventing unsafe, toxic or biased generations. Code Llama - Instruct variants are further fine-tuned on a mix of proprietary instruction data for improved safety and helpfulness, and a new machine-generated self-instruct dataset created by prompting Llama 2 for coding problems and Code Llama to generate associated unit tests and solutions. Our results show that Code Llama - Instruct significantly improves performance on various truthfulness, toxicity and bias benchmarks at moderate cost in terms of code generation performance (Section 4).
items.zh: 指令微调。对于最终用户，LLM 的实用性通过指令微调（Ouyang et al., 2022; Wei et al., 2022; OpenAI, 2023; Touvron et al., 2023b）显著提高，这也有助于防止不安全、有毒或有偏见的生成。Code Llama - Instruct 变体进一步在专有指令数据混合和新的机器生成的自指令数据集上微调，该数据集通过提示 Llama 2 生成编码问题，并提示 Code Llama 生成相关的单元测试和解决方案。我们的结果表明，Code Llama - Instruct 在各种真实性、毒性和偏见基准测试上显著提高了性能，同时在代码生成性能方面代价适中（第 4 节）。

items.en: Different combinations of these approaches lead to a family of code-specialized Llama 2 models with three main variants that we release in four sizes (7B, 13B, 34B and 70B parameters):
items.zh: 这些方法的不同组合导致了一个代码专业化的 Llama 2 模型家族，具有三个主要变体，我们以四种尺寸（7B、13B、34B 和 70B 参数）发布：

items.en: Code Llama: a foundational model for code generation tasks,
items.zh: Code Llama：用于代码生成任务的基础模型，

items.en: Code Llama - Python: specialized for Python,
items.zh: Code Llama - Python：专用于 Python，

items.en: Code Llama - Instruct: fine-tuned with human instructions and self-instruct code synthesis data.
items.zh: Code Llama - Instruct：使用人类指令和自指令代码合成数据进行微调。

items.en: An example of using Code Llama - Instruct is given in Figure 1. It show-cases that the model interprets natural language to determine suitable options for a command-line program and provides an explanation of the solution. We provide further qualitative examples in Appendix L. We perform exhaustive evaluations of our models on major code generation benchmarks: HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021), MBPP (Austin et al., 2021), and APPS (Hendrycks et al., 2021), as well as a multilingual version of HumanEval (MultiPL-E, Cassano et al., 2023), where our best models establish a new state of the art amongst open-source LLMs. The technical details of our training and fine-tuning procedures are provided in Section 2, followed by in-depth experiments and ablation studies, details of the safety/helpfulness evaluations and a discussion of related work.
items.zh: 图 1 给出了使用 Code Llama - Instruct 的示例。它展示了模型解释自然语言以确定命令行程序的合适选项，并提供解决方案的解释。我们在附录 L 中提供了进一步的定性示例。我们对我们的模型在主要代码生成基准测试上进行了详尽评估：HumanEval（Chen et al., 2021）、MBPP（Austin et al., 2021）和 APPS（Hendrycks et al., 2021），以及 HumanEval 的多语言版本（MultiPL-E, Cassano et al., 2023），我们最好的模型在开源 LLM 中建立了新的最先进水平。我们训练和微调过程的技术细节在第 2 节中提供，随后是深入的实验和消融研究、安全性/有用性评估的细节以及相关工作的讨论。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The Code Llama specialization pipeline. The different stages of fine-tuning annotated with the number of tokens seen during training. Infilling-capable models are marked with the ⇄⇄\rightleftarrows symbol.
items.capZh: 图 2：Code Llama 专业化流程。微调的不同阶段标注了训练期间看到的令牌数量。具有填充能力的模型用 ⇄⇄\rightleftarrows 符号标记。

items.en: The Code Llama models constitute foundation models for code generation. They come in four model sizes: 7B, 13B, 34B and 70B parameters. The 7B, 13B and 70B models are trained using an infilling objective (Section 2.3), and are appropriate to be used in an IDE to complete code in the middle of a file, for example. The 34B model was trained without the infilling objective. All Code Llama models are initialized with Llama 2 model weights and trained on 500B tokens from a code-heavy dataset (see Section 2.2 for more details), except Code Llama 70B which was trained on 1T tokens. They are all fine-tuned to handle long contexts as detailed in Section 2.4.
items.zh: Code Llama 模型构成了代码生成的基础模型。它们有四种模型尺寸：7B、13B、34B 和 70B 参数。7B、13B 和 70B 模型使用填充目标（第 2.3 节）进行训练，适合在 IDE 中用于在文件中间补全代码等。34B 模型没有使用填充目标进行训练。所有 Code Llama 模型都用 Llama 2 模型权重初始化，并在来自代码密集型数据集的 500B 令牌上训练（更多细节见第 2.2 节），但 Code Llama 70B 在 1T 令牌上训练。它们都经过微调以处理长上下文，详见第 2.4 节。

items.en: The Code Llama - Python models are specialized for Python code generation and come in sizes of 7B, 13B, 34B and 70B parameters. They are designed to study the performance of models tailored to a single programming language, compared to general-purpose code generation models. Initialized from Llama 2 models and trained on 500B tokens from the Code Llama dataset, Code Llama - Python models are further specialized on 100B tokens using a Python-heavy dataset (Section 2.2). Code Llama - Python with 7B, 13B and 34B parameters are trained without infilling and subsequently fine-tuned to handle long contexts (Section 2.4).
items.zh: Code Llama - Python 模型专用于 Python 代码生成，有 7B、13B、34B 和 70B 参数尺寸。它们旨在研究针对单一编程语言的模型与通用代码生成模型的性能比较。从 Llama 2 模型初始化并在 Code Llama 数据集的 500B 令牌上训练后，Code Llama - Python 模型进一步在 Python 密集型数据集（第 2.2 节）上使用 100B 令牌进行专业化。7B、13B 和 34B 参数的 Code Llama - Python 在没有填充的情况下训练，随后进行微调以处理长上下文（第 2.4 节）。

items.en: For the 7B, 13B and 34B sizes, Code Llama - Instruct models are based on Code Llama and fine-tuned with an additional approx. 5B tokens to better follow human instructions. More details on Code Llama - Instruct can be found in Section 2.5.
items.zh: 对于 7B、13B 和 34B 尺寸，Code Llama - Instruct 模型基于 Code Llama，并使用额外的约 5B 令牌进行微调，以更好地遵循人类指令。关于 Code Llama - Instruct 的更多细节可以在第 2.5 节中找到。

items.en: Code Llama 70B was trained months after the Code Llama 7B, 13B and 34B model. It was trained using the same data as the smaller versions of Code Llama, and using roughly the same methods. Code Llama 70B was trained on twice the number of tokens: 1 trillion instead of 500 billion. It was trained with FIM, which was an often-requested capability for the 34B model. Only the base Code Llama 70B was trained with LCFT. See Appendix B for Code Llama 70B specialization pipeline. Code Llama - Instruct 70B was trained from Code Llama - Python 70B, which outperforms Code Llama 70B in average on the languages from MultiPL-E including python.
items.zh: Code Llama 70B 是在 Code Llama 7B、13B 和 34B 模型发布几个月后训练的。它使用与较小版本 Code Llama 相同的数据，以及大致相同的方法。Code Llama 70B 训练的令牌数量是两倍：1 万亿而不是 5000 亿。它使用 FIM 进行训练，这是 34B 模型经常被要求的能力。只有基础 Code Llama 70B 使用 LCFT 训练。有关 Code Llama 70B 专业化流程，请参见附录 B。Code Llama - Instruct 70B 是从 Code Llama - Python 70B 训练的，后者在 MultiPL-E 的语言（包括 Python）上平均优于 Code Llama 70B。

items.en: We train Code Llama 7B, 13B and 34B on 500B tokens, and Code Llama 70B on 1T tokens during the initial phase, starting from the 7B, 13B, 34B, and 70B versions of Llama 2. As shown in Table 1, Code Llama is trained predominantly on a near-deduplicated dataset of publicly available code. We also source 8% of our samples data from natural language datasets related to code. This dataset contains many discussions about code and code snippets included in natural language questions or answers. To help the model retain natural language understanding skills, we also sample a small proportion of our batches from a natural language dataset. Data is tokenized via byte pair encoding (BPE, Sennrich et al. (2016)), employing the same tokenizer as Llama and Llama 2. Preliminary experiments suggested that adding batches sampled from our natural language dataset improves the performance of our models on MBPP.
items.zh: 我们在初始阶段训练 Code Llama 7B、13B 和 34B 使用 500B 令牌，Code Llama 70B 使用 1T 令牌，从 Llama 2 的 7B、13B、34B 和 70B 版本开始。如表 1 所示，Code Llama 主要在一个近乎去重的公开可用代码数据集上训练。我们还从与代码相关的自然语言数据集中获取了 8% 的样本数据。该数据集包含许多关于代码的讨论以及包含在自然语言问题或答案中的代码片段。为了帮助模型保留自然语言理解能力，我们还从自然语言数据集中采样了一小部分批次。数据通过字节对编码（BPE, Sennrich et al. (2016)）进行分词，使用与 Llama 和 Llama 2 相同的分词器。初步实验表明，添加从自然语言数据集中采样的批次可以提高我们的模型在 MBPP 上的性能。

items.en: Code infilling is the task of predicting the missing part of a program given a surrounding context. Applications include code completion at the cursor’s position in code IDEs, type inference and generation of in-code documentation (e.g., docstrings).
items.zh: 代码填充是在给定周围上下文的情况下预测程序缺失部分的任务。应用包括代码 IDE 中光标位置的代码补全、类型推断和代码内文档（例如文档字符串）的生成。

items.en: We train infilling models following the concept of causal masking (Aghajanyan et al., 2022; Fried et al., 2023), where parts of a training sequence are moved to the end, and the reordered sequence is predicted autoregressively. We train the general-purpose 7B, 13B and 70B models with an infilling objective, following the recommendations of Bavarian et al. (2022). More precisely, we split training documents at the character level into a prefix, a middle part and a suffix with the splitting locations sampled independently from a uniform distribution over the document length. We apply this transformation with a probability of 0.9 and to documents that are not cut across multiple model contexts only. We randomly format half of the splits in the prefix-suffix-middle (PSM) format and the other half in the compatible suffix-prefix-middle (SPM) format described in Bavarian et al. (2022, App. D). We extend Llama 2’s tokenizer with four special tokens that mark the beginning of the prefix, the middle part or the suffix, and the end of the infilling span. To limit the distribution shift between autoregressive and infilling training, we suppress the implicit leading space that SentencePiece tokenizers add upon encoding the middle part and the suffix (Kudo & Richardson, 2018). In SPM format, we concatenate the prefix and the middle part before encoding to tokens. Note that our model doesn’t encounter split subtokens in the SPM format while it does in the PSM format.
items.zh: 我们按照因果掩码的概念（Aghajanyan et al., 2022; Fried et al., 2023）训练填充模型，其中训练序列的部分被移到末尾，重新排序后的序列被自回归预测。我们按照 Bavarian et al. (2022) 的建议，使用填充目标训练通用 7B、13B 和 70B 模型。更准确地说，我们在字符级别将训练文档拆分为前缀、中间部分和后缀，拆分位置从文档长度上的均匀分布中独立采样。我们以 0.9 的概率应用此变换，并且仅应用于不跨多个模型上下文的文档。我们随机将一半的拆分格式化为前缀-后缀-中间（PSM）格式，另一半格式化为兼容的后缀-前缀-中间（SPM）格式，如 Bavarian et al. (2022, App. D) 所述。我们扩展了 Llama 2 的分词器，添加了四个特殊令牌，分别标记前缀、中间部分或后缀的开始，以及填充跨度的结束。为了限制自回归和填充训练之间的分布偏移，我们抑制了 SentencePiece 分词器在编码中间部分和后缀时添加的隐式前导空格（Kudo & Richardson, 2018）。在 SPM 格式中，我们在编码为令牌之前连接前缀和中间部分。请注意，我们的模型在 SPM 格式中不会遇到拆分后的子令牌，而在 PSM 格式中会遇到。

items.en: Results on the effect of infilling training on downstream generation tasks and the performance of our infilling models on infilling benchmarks are reported in Section 3.2.
items.zh: 关于填充训练对下游生成任务的影响以及我们的填充模型在填充基准测试上的性能的结果在第 3.2 节中报告。

items.en: Effective handling of long sequences is a major topic of research in transformer-based language modeling (Vaswani et al., 2017). The fundamental modeling challenges are extrapolation, i.e., operating on sequence lengths beyond those seen at training time, and the quadratic complexity of attention passes which favors training on short-to-medium length inputs.
items.zh: 有效处理长序列是基于Transformer的语言建模中的一个主要研究课题（Vaswani等人，2017）。基本的建模挑战是外推，即在训练时未见过的序列长度上操作，以及注意力机制的二次复杂度，这有利于在短到中等长度的输入上进行训练。

items.en: For Code Llama, we propose a dedicated long context fine-tuning (LCFT) stage in which models are presented with sequences of 16,384 tokens, up from the 4,096 tokens used for Llama 2 and our initial code training stages. By limiting the training time spent on processing long sequences to a fine-tuning stage, we gain long-range capabilities without significantly increasing the cost of training our models. Our strategy is similar to the recently proposed fine-tuning by position interpolation (Chen et al., 2023b), and we confirm the importance of modifying the rotation frequencies of the rotary position embedding used in the Llama 2 foundation models (Su et al., 2021). However, instead of downscaling frequencies linearly as Chen et al. (2023b), we change the base period from which they are derived. Specifically, with rotary embeddings, the query and key vectors 𝐱nsubscript𝐱𝑛\mathbf{x}_{n} at position n𝑛n are subject to a linear transformation 𝐑Θ,nd​𝐱nsubscriptsuperscript𝐑𝑑Θ𝑛subscript𝐱𝑛\mathbf{R}^{d}_{\Theta,n}\mathbf{x}_{n}, where 𝐑Θ,ndsubscriptsuperscript𝐑𝑑Θ𝑛\mathbf{R}^{d}_{\Theta,n} is a block diagonal matrix with entries of the form
items.zh: 对于Code Llama，我们提出了一个专用的长上下文微调（LCFT）阶段，其中模型被呈现16,384个token的序列，而Llama 2和我们初始代码训练阶段使用的序列长度为4,096个token。通过将处理长序列的训练时间限制在微调阶段，我们在不显著增加模型训练成本的情况下获得了长距离能力。我们的策略类似于最近提出的位置插值微调（Chen等人，2023b），并且我们确认了修改Llama 2基础模型中使用的旋转位置嵌入的旋转频率的重要性（Su等人，2021）。然而，与Chen等人（2023b）线性降低频率不同，我们改变了推导频率的基础周期。具体来说，使用旋转嵌入时，位置n处的查询和键向量x_n经历线性变换R^d_{Θ,n} x_n，其中R^d_{Θ,n}是一个块对角矩阵，其条目形式为

items.en: and d𝑑d denotes the embedding dimension. Rotation frequencies are computed as θi=θ−2​i/dsubscript𝜃𝑖superscript𝜃2𝑖𝑑\theta_{i}=\theta^{-2i/d}, and we increase the base period θ𝜃\theta from 10,000 to 1,000,000 for fine-tuning. This increase allows for processing much larger sequences and reduces bias towards short-distance attention (see Section G.1 for further discussion). Our experiments confirm that Code Llama models are not only effective within the increased sequence length used during fine-tuning, but further show extrapolation capabilities and exhibit stable behavior on very long sequences of up to 100,000 tokens (Section 3.3).
items.zh: 且d表示嵌入维度。旋转频率计算为θ_i = θ^{-2i/d}，我们将基础周期θ从10,000增加到1,000,000用于微调。这种增加允许处理更大的序列，并减少对短距离注意力的偏见（进一步讨论见附录G.1）。我们的实验证实，Code Llama模型不仅在微调期间使用的增加序列长度内有效，而且进一步展示了外推能力，并在长达100,000个token的非常长序列上表现出稳定行为（第3.3节）。

items.en: Our instruction fine-tuned models Code Llama - Instruct are based on Code Llama and trained to answer questions appropriately. They are trained on three different types of data.
items.zh: 我们的指令微调模型Code Llama - Instruct基于Code Llama，并经过训练以适当回答问题。它们在三种不同类型的数据上进行训练。

items.en: We use the instruction tuning dataset collected for Llama 2 and described in detail by Touvron et al. (2023b). Specifically, we use the version referred to in their paper as “RLHF V5”, collected through several stages of reinforcement learning from human feedback and human feedback annotation (see their Section 3 for more details). It combines thousands of Supervised Fine-Tuning and millions of Rejection Sampling examples. Each example consists of a multi-turn dialogue between a user and an assistant. For Rejection Sampling, the output was selected among several generations using a reward model. The final dataset contains both Helpfulness and Safety data. This enables Code Llama to inherit Llama 2’s instruction following and safety properties.
items.zh: 我们使用为Llama 2收集并在Touvron等人（2023b）中详细描述的指令调优数据集。具体来说，我们使用他们论文中称为“RLHF V5”的版本，该版本通过几个阶段的基于人类反馈的强化学习和人类反馈注释收集（更多细节见他们的第3节）。它结合了数千个监督微调和数百万个拒绝采样示例。每个示例由用户和助手之间的多轮对话组成。对于拒绝采样，输出是通过奖励模型从多个生成中选择的。最终数据集包含有用性和安全性数据。这使得Code Llama能够继承Llama 2的指令遵循和安全属性。

items.en: Our proprietary dataset contains few examples of code-related tasks. Collecting supervised data from human annotators or training from human feedback (Ouyang et al., 2022) is expensive for coding tasks as it requires input from professional developers. Instead of human feedback, we use execution feedback to select data to train our instruct model. We construct the self-instruction dataset following the recipe below, resulting in ∼similar-to\sim14,000 question-tests-solution triplets:
items.zh: 我们的专有数据集包含少量与代码相关的任务示例。从人类注释者收集监督数据或从人类反馈中训练（Ouyang等人，2022）对于编码任务来说成本高昂，因为它需要专业开发人员的输入。我们使用执行反馈而不是人类反馈来选择数据来训练我们的指令模型。我们按照以下步骤构建自指令数据集，得到约14,000个问题-测试-解决方案三元组：

items.en: Generate 62,000 interview-style programming questions by prompting (Figure 10) Llama 2 70B.
items.zh: 通过提示（图10）Llama 2 70B生成62,000个面试风格的编程问题。

items.en: De-duplicate the set of questions by removing exact duplicates, resulting in ∼similar-to\sim52,000 questions.
items.zh: 通过删除完全重复的问题对问题集进行去重，得到约52,000个问题。

items.en: Generate unit tests by prompting Code Llama 7B (Figure 11)
items.zh: 通过提示Code Llama 7B生成单元测试（图11）。

items.en: Generate ten Python solutions by prompting Code Llama 7B (Figure 12)
items.zh: 通过提示Code Llama 7B生成十个Python解决方案（图12）。

items.en: Run the unit tests on the ten solutions. Add the first solution that passes the tests (along with its corresponding question and tests) to the self-instruct dataset.
items.zh: 在十个解决方案上运行单元测试。将第一个通过测试的解决方案（连同其对应的问题和测试）添加到自指令数据集中。

items.en: We use Code Llama 7B to generate the tests and Python solutions, as we found it more efficient than generating fewer solutions per question with the 34B model for the same compute budget.
items.zh: 我们使用Code Llama 7B生成测试和Python解决方案，因为我们发现在相同的算力预算下，这比使用34B模型为每个问题生成更少的解决方案更高效。

items.en: In order to prevent the model from regressing on general coding and language understanding capabilities, Code Llama - Instruct is also trained with a small proportion of data from the code dataset (6%) and our natural language dataset (2%).
items.zh: 为了防止模型在通用编码和语言理解能力上退化，Code Llama - Instruct还使用了一小部分来自代码数据集（6%）和我们的自然语言数据集（2%）的数据进行训练。

items.en: Our optimizer is AdamW (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2019) with β1subscript𝛽1\beta_{1} and β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2} values of 0.9 and 0.95. We use a cosine schedule with 100010001000 warm-up steps, and set the final learning rate to be 1/30th of the peak learning rate. We use a batch size of 4M tokens which are presented as sequences of 4,096 tokens each. Despite the standard practice of using lower learning rates in fine-tuning stages than in pre-training stages, we obtained best results when retaining the original learning rate of the Llama 2 base model. We carry these findings to the 13B, 34B and 70B models, and set their learning rates to 3​e−43superscript𝑒43e^{-4}, 1.5​e−41.5superscript𝑒41.5e^{-4}, and 1.5​e−41.5superscript𝑒41.5e^{-4} respectively. For python fine-tuning, we set the initial learning rate to 1​e−41superscript𝑒41e^{-4} instead. For Code Llama - Instruct, we train with a batch size of 524,288 tokens and on approx. 5B tokens in total.
items.zh: 我们的优化器是AdamW（Loshchilov & Hutter, 2019），β1和β2值分别为0.9和0.95。我们使用余弦调度，包含1000个预热步骤，并将最终学习率设置为峰值学习率的1/30。我们使用4M token的批量大小，每个序列由4,096个token组成。尽管在微调阶段使用比预训练阶段更低的学习率是标准做法，但我们在保留Llama 2基础模型原始学习率时获得了最佳结果。我们将这些发现应用于13B、34B和70B模型，并将它们的学习率分别设置为3e-4、1.5e-4和1.5e-4。对于Python微调，我们将初始学习率设置为1e-4。对于Code Llama - Instruct，我们使用524,288个token的批量大小，总共训练约5B个token。

items.en: For long context fine-tuning (LCFT), we use a learning rate of 2​e−52superscript𝑒52e^{-5}, a sequence length of 16,384, and reset RoPE frequencies with a base value of θ=106𝜃superscript106\theta=10^{6}. The batch size is set to 2M tokens for model sizes 7B and 13B and to 1M tokens for model size 34B, respectively. Training lasts for 10,000 gradient steps by default. We observed instabilities in downstream performance for certain configurations, and hence set the number of gradient steps to 11,000 for the 34B models and to 3,000 for Code Llama 7B.
items.zh: 对于长上下文微调（LCFT），我们使用2e-5的学习率，序列长度为16,384，并重置RoPE频率，基础值θ=10^6。对于7B和13B模型，批量大小设置为2M token，对于34B模型设置为1M token。默认情况下，训练持续10,000个梯度步。我们观察到某些配置在下游性能上存在不稳定性，因此将34B模型的梯度步数设置为11,000，Code Llama 7B设置为3,000。

items.en: We report results on a variety of benchmarks. First, we evaluate our models on popular description-to-code generation benchmarks for Python: HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021), MBPP (Austin et al., 2021), and APPS (programming interviews and competitions, Hendrycks et al., 2021). Second, we evaluate our models on further programming languages using MultiPL-E (Cassano et al., 2023), namely on C++, Java, PHP, C#, TypeScript (TS), and Bash. We additionally report results on the GSM8K benchmark (Cobbe et al., 2021), which measures mathematical reasoning capabilities (Appendix D).
items.zh: 我们在各种基准测试上报告结果。首先，我们在流行的Python描述到代码生成基准测试上评估我们的模型：HumanEval（Chen等人，2021）、MBPP（Austin等人，2021）和APPS（编程面试和竞赛，Hendrycks等人，2021）。其次，我们使用MultiPL-E（Cassano等人，2023）在更多编程语言上评估我们的模型，包括C++、Java、PHP、C#、TypeScript（TS）和Bash。我们还报告了GSM8K基准测试（Cobbe等人，2021）的结果，该测试衡量数学推理能力（附录D）。

items.en: Next, we perform an extensive ablation study: (i) we study the impact of training from scratch or from a pretrained Llama 2 model in Section 3.4.1; (ii) we perform ablations for infilling and additional infilling specific benchmarks in Section 3.2; (iii) we study the effect of long context fine-tuning on perplexity, a synthetic retrieval task, and code completion with long source code files (Section 3.3); and (iv) we evaluate our instruction fine-tuning procedure, which includes self-instruct training by leveraging self-generated unit tests in Section 3.4.2.
items.zh: 接下来，我们进行了广泛的消融研究：（i）我们在第3.4.1节中研究了从头训练或从预训练的Llama 2模型训练的影响；（ii）我们在第3.2节中对填充和额外的填充特定基准进行了消融；（iii）我们研究了长上下文微调对困惑度、合成检索任务和长源代码文件代码补全的影响（第3.3节）；（iv）我们在第3.4.2节中评估了我们的指令微调过程，包括通过利用自生成的单元测试进行自指令训练。

items.en: We start by reporting results for Python code generation using the HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021), MBPP (Austin et al., 2021) and APPS (Hendrycks et al., 2021) benchmarks. Results are summarized in Tables 2 and 3. The full list of results on HumanEval and MBPP, including models with and without infilling and long context fine-tuning, can be found in Table 10 in Appendix C. We provide zero-shot results of our instruction fine-tuned models on APPS in Table 15 with evaluation details in Appendix F. Our main findings are as follows.
items.zh: 我们首先报告使用HumanEval（Chen等人，2021）、MBPP（Austin等人，2021）和APPS（Hendrycks等人，2021）基准测试的Python代码生成结果。结果总结在表2和表3中。HumanEval和MBPP的完整结果列表，包括有和没有填充和长上下文微调的模型，可以在附录C的表10中找到。我们在附录F中提供了指令微调模型在APPS上的零样本结果，评估细节见附录F。我们的主要发现如下。

items.en: We observe that model specialization is yields a boost in code generation capabilities when comparing Llama 2 to Code Llama and Code Llama to Code Llama - Python. Llama 2 was trained on 2T tokens, and training on only 500B of extra tokens from a code-heavy dataset results in massive performance gains on both HumanEval and MBPP, to the point that Llama 2 70B is roughly equivalent to Code Llama 7B on Python coding benchmarks. Although Code Llama was trained on more than two epochs of our code dataset, which contains our entire Python dataset, training on 100B extra tokens of a Python-heavy data mix leads to significant gains on Python code generation benchmarks, between 4.3% points and 8.3% points in HumanEval pass@1 and between 1.2% points and 6.4% points in MBPP pass@1. These gains are smaller than for the first code training step, but still allow Code Llama - Python 7B to outperform even Code Llama 13B on MBPP and HumanEval. For the APPS benchmark, the prompts are much less direct and more complex compared to MBPP and HumanEval. Our Code Llama - Python models show slightly decreased performance on the introductory and interview level problems, where understanding the prompt is often more challenging for a language model than implementing a solution. However, Code Llama - Python shows clear gains on the competition-level problems where solutions are more complex. While large language models have enough capacity to learn to generate text on various topics, we observe that model specialization is beneficial for models between 7B and 70B parameters and after two full epochs on the training data.
items.zh: 我们观察到，当比较Llama 2与Code Llama以及Code Llama与Code Llama - Python时，模型专业化在代码生成能力上带来了提升。Llama 2在2T token上训练，而仅在来自代码密集型数据集的额外500B token上训练就在HumanEval和MBPP上带来了巨大的性能提升，以至于Llama 2 70B在Python编码基准测试上大致相当于Code Llama 7B。尽管Code Llama在我们的代码数据集上训练了超过两个epoch，该数据集包含我们整个Python数据集，但在额外的100B token的Python密集型数据混合上训练导致了Python代码生成基准测试的显著提升，HumanEval pass@1提升4.3到8.3个百分点，MBPP pass@1提升1.2到6.4个百分点。这些提升小于第一个代码训练步骤，但仍然使Code Llama - Python 7B在MBPP和HumanEval上甚至超过Code Llama 13B。对于APPS基准测试，提示比MBPP和HumanEval更不直接且更复杂。我们的Code Llama - Python模型在入门级和面试级问题上表现出略微下降的性能，在这些问题上，理解提示通常比实现解决方案对语言模型更具挑战性。然而，Code Llama - Python在解决方案更复杂的竞赛级问题上显示出明显的提升。虽然大型语言模型有足够的能力学习生成各种主题的文本，但我们观察到模型专业化对于7B到70B参数的模型以及在训练数据上经过两个完整epoch后是有益的。

items.en: We observe that scaling the number of parameters matters for models specialized for coding. With the same training process, our larger models outperform their smaller counterparts on almost every metric from HumanEval, MBPP and APPS (Table 2, 3). For instance, we gain 5.6 percentage points on MBPP pass@1 scaling Code Llama from 7B to 13B parameters, 8 more points when scaling to 34B and 7 when scaling to 70B. We can hypothesize that specializing larger models to code would lead to significant further gains on coding tasks. Moreover, the Chinchilla scaling laws (Hoffmann et al., 2022) indicate that larger models would benefit more from training on more tokens.
items.zh: 我们观察到，对于专门用于编码的模型，参数规模的扩展很重要。使用相同的训练过程，我们的较大模型在HumanEval、MBPP和APPS的几乎所有指标上都优于较小的模型（表2、3）。例如，将Code Llama从7B扩展到13B参数，我们在MBPP pass@1上获得5.6个百分点的提升，扩展到34B时再获得8个点，扩展到70B时再获得7个点。我们可以假设，将更大的模型专门用于代码将导致编码任务的进一步显著提升。此外，Chinchilla缩放定律（Hoffmann等人，2022）表明，更大的模型将从更多token的训练中受益更多。

items.en: Next, we evaluate our models on a more diverse set of programming languages. For that, we use the MultiPL-E benchmark (Cassano et al., 2023). We report results for Python, C++, Java, PHP, TypeScript, C#, and Bash in Table 4.
items.zh: 接下来，我们在更多样化的编程语言上评估模型。为此，我们使用MultiPL-E基准（Cassano等人，2023）。我们在表4中报告了Python、C++、Java、PHP、TypeScript、C#和Bash的结果。

items.en: We observe a similar improvement from Llama 2 to Code Llama in the multilingual setting as in the evaluation on Python (Section 3.1.1). The Code Llama models clearly outperform Llama 2 models of the same size on code generation in any language, and Code Llama 7B even outperforms Llama 2 70B. Compared to other publicly available models, ours are especially strong in the multilingual setting. Code Llama 7B outperforms larger models such as CodeGen-Multi or StarCoder, and is on par with Codex (code-cushman-001, Chen et al., 2021).
items.zh: 我们观察到，在多语言设置中，从Llama 2到Code Llama的改进与Python评估（第3.1.1节）类似。Code Llama模型在任何语言的代码生成上都明显优于相同大小的Llama 2模型，而Code Llama 7B甚至优于Llama 2 70B。与其他公开可用的模型相比，我们的模型在多语言设置中尤其强大。Code Llama 7B优于更大的模型，如CodeGen-Multi或StarCoder，并与Codex（code-cushman-001，Chen等人，2021）相当。

items.en: The performance of Code Llama - Python is comparable to that of Code Llama. Code Llama - Python 30B performs slightly worse than Code Llama but Code Llama - Python 7B and 13B perform slightly better than their counterparts without Python fine-tuning. More detailed results can be found in Table 11, Appendix C.
items.zh: Code Llama - Python的性能与Code Llama相当。Code Llama - Python 30B的表现略逊于Code Llama，但Code Llama - Python 7B和13B的表现略优于未经过Python微调的对应模型。更详细的结果见附录C的表11。

items.en: To better understand the influence of multilingual pre-training, we measure the correlations between each of the evaluated languages and report the results separately for different model sizes in Figure 3. We observe high correlation between model performance on C++, C#, Java, and PHP. Interestingly, we also notice strong correlation between model performance on Python and Bash. Lastly, as expected the bigger and more expressive the models, the higher the correlation between the performance across all different languages.
items.zh: 为了更好地理解多语言预训练的影响，我们测量了每种评估语言之间的相关性，并在图3中分别报告了不同模型大小的结果。我们观察到C++、C#、Java和PHP的模型性能之间存在高度相关性。有趣的是，我们还注意到Python和Bash的模型性能之间存在强相关性。最后，正如预期的那样，模型越大、表达能力越强，所有不同语言之间的性能相关性就越高。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Correlations between Languages. Correlation scores between the Python, C++, Java, PHP, C#, TypeScript (TS), and Bash, reported for different model sizes. The code for this figure was generated by Code Llama - Instruct, the prompt and code can be seen in Figure 22.
items.capZh: 图3：语言之间的相关性。不同模型大小下Python、C++、Java、PHP、C#、TypeScript（TS）和Bash之间的相关性分数。此图的代码由Code Llama - Instruct生成，提示和代码见图22。

items.en: Previous studies on infilling (or fill-in-the-middle, FIM) code models assert that the traditional next token prediction objective can be replaced by a multitask infilling objective with an infilling rate of up to 90 % at no cost for left-to-right autoregressive test losses (Bavarian et al., 2022) and only small cost for downstream evaluation performance (Allal et al., 2023). In Table 5, we independently validate both findings at the scale of 7B and 13B parameters and 500B training tokens of code. The 7B model loses 0.6 percentage points on average across HumanEval and MBPP pass@1, pass@10 and pass@100 scores if trained with an infilling objective, while the 13B model loses 1.1 percentage points. Because of this modest decline in performance and the wide applicability of models with infilling capability, we decide to release Code Llama 7B, 13B and 70B in this configuration.
items.zh: 先前关于代码模型填充（或中间填充，FIM）的研究表明，传统的下一个词预测目标可以被多任务填充目标取代，填充率高达90%，且不会增加从左到右自回归测试损失（Bavarian等人，2022），仅对下游评估性能造成微小损失（Allal等人，2023）。在表5中，我们独立验证了这两个发现，规模为7B和13B参数以及500B训练代码token。如果使用填充目标训练，7B模型在HumanEval和MBPP的pass@1、pass@10和pass@100分数上平均损失0.6个百分点，而13B模型损失1.1个百分点。由于这种适度的性能下降以及具有填充能力的模型的广泛适用性，我们决定以这种配置发布Code Llama 7B、13B和70B。

items.en: Our infilling models reach state-of-the-art performances in code infilling benchmarks among models of their size. We evaluate on two related code infilling benchmarks based on the HumanEval benchmark (Chen et al., 2021).
items.zh: 我们的填充模型在代码填充基准测试中达到了其大小模型中的最先进性能。我们基于HumanEval基准（Chen等人，2021）在两个相关的代码填充基准上进行了评估。

items.en: The HumanEval infilling benchmark (Fried et al., 2023) turns the reference solutions of the HumanEval benchmark (Chen et al., 2021) into infilling problems by masking out either individual lines or blocks consisting of multiple consecutive lines. It has been extended in Bavarian et al. (2022) with a random span infilling task in which the masking is applied to a randomly selected substring at the character level. Predictions are scored with a pass@1 score based on the test cases of the original HumanEval problems. According to the results in Table 14, our models outperform all other infilling models of their size. Note, however, that the results in random span infilling are significantly worse in suffix-prefix-middle (SPM) format than in prefix-suffix-middle (PSM) format as it would require token healing (Microsoft, 2023), which we have not implemented for this evaluation (see Appendix E for further discussion).
items.zh: HumanEval填充基准（Fried等人，2023）通过屏蔽单个行或多个连续行组成的块，将HumanEval基准（Chen等人，2021）的参考解决方案转化为填充问题。Bavarian等人（2022）对其进行了扩展，增加了一个随机跨度填充任务，其中屏蔽应用于字符级别随机选择的子字符串。预测根据原始HumanEval问题的测试用例以pass@1分数进行评分。根据表14的结果，我们的模型优于所有其他相同大小的填充模型。但请注意，在后缀-前缀-中间（SPM）格式中，随机跨度填充的结果明显差于前缀-后缀-中间（PSM）格式，因为它需要token修复（Microsoft，2023），而我们尚未为此评估实现该功能（进一步讨论见附录E）。

items.en: Allal et al. (2023) translates the HumanEval infilling benchmark to other programming languages using MultiPL-E (Cassano et al., 2023). Single lines are masked and predictions are scored with an exact match metric against the ground truth solution. Our models, including Code Llama 7B, outperform all open infilling models across the three programming languages contained in the benchmark (Table 6). We observe a further increase in performance when prompting the models in SPM format, like witnessed in Bavarian et al. (2022).
items.zh: Allal等人（2023）使用MultiPL-E（Cassano等人，2023）将HumanEval填充基准翻译成其他编程语言。单行被屏蔽，预测使用精确匹配指标与真实解决方案进行评分。我们的模型，包括Code Llama 7B，在基准中包含的三种编程语言上优于所有开放的填充模型（表6）。我们观察到，当以SPM格式提示模型时，性能进一步提高，如Bavarian等人（2022）所见。

items.en: We explore Code Llama’s ability to work with long sequences by measuring perplexity, key retrieval accuracy and performance during generation on code completion tasks. These tasks, and our results are detailed below. For full results and comparisons to alternative techniques of increasing the context length of LLMs, we refer to Appendix G.
items.zh: 我们通过测量代码完成任务中的困惑度、关键检索准确率和生成性能，探索了Code Llama处理长序列的能力。这些任务及其结果详述如下。关于完整结果以及与增加LLM上下文长度的替代技术的比较，请参考附录G。

items.en: In Figure 4(a), perplexity is computed over 4M tokens from the code dataset, using a subset of our validation data consisting of large source files (≥\geq50kB). For all model sizes, we observe a steady decrease in perplexity well beyond 16384 tokens, which is the sequence length we use for long-context fine-tuning. After 100K tokens, the perplexity increases only slightly, in contrast to the well-known instability phenomenon when testing transformer models on sequences larger than those seen during training (Press et al., 2022).
items.zh: 在图4(a)中，困惑度是在代码数据集的4M token上计算的，使用了验证数据的一个子集，该子集由大型源文件（≥50kB）组成。对于所有模型大小，我们观察到困惑度在远超过16384个token时持续下降，而16384是我们用于长上下文微调的序列长度。在100K token之后，困惑度仅略有增加，这与在训练期间未见过的序列上测试Transformer模型时众所周知的稳定性现象相反（Press等人，2022）。

items.en: In Figure 4(b), we investigate key retrieval performance in synthetic task. The prompt consists of a large amount of syntactically valid Python code, with a function returning a scalar inserted at a specified position. The model is asked to complete an assert statement with the return value of the inserted function. Liu et al. (2023b) showed that the inability to recall content placed in the middle of long prompts is a common failure mode in LLMs; our retrieval task is analogous to their setup, albeit tailored to code models which are not fine-tuned to follow instructions. All models exhibit strong retrieval performance on the sequence length they were trained on, with the exception of the 7B model for test cases in which the function is placed at the beginning of the prompt. We include OpenAI’s gpt-3.5-turbo-16k-0613 as a reference. We query GPT with a system prompt of “Complete the following code.” and a temperature of 0. For sequences beyond 16K tokens, i.e., when extrapolating, our models exhibit a decrease in performance (Section G.3).
items.zh: 在图4(b)中，我们研究了合成任务中的关键检索性能。提示由大量语法有效的Python代码组成，其中在指定位置插入了一个返回标量的函数。模型被要求完成一个assert语句，该语句包含插入函数的返回值。Liu等人（2023b）表明，无法回忆放置在长提示中间的内容是LLM中常见的失败模式；我们的检索任务类似于他们的设置，尽管是针对未经过微调以遵循指令的代码模型。所有模型在它们训练的序列长度上都表现出强大的检索性能，但7B模型在函数放置在提示开头时的测试用例中除外。我们包含OpenAI的gpt-3.5-turbo-16k-0613作为参考。我们使用系统提示“Complete the following code.”和温度为0查询GPT。对于超过16K token的序列，即外推时，我们的模型表现出性能下降（第G.3节）。

items.en: Finally, we test the benefits of the ability to handle long context sizes in a single line code completion task. Our task is based on the Long Code Completion (LCC) benchmark (Guo et al., 2023).222Note that LCC data points are included in our code training data. The LCC test set is skewed towards shorter files and we hence sample a new set of examples from LCC’s validation and test set with an equalized distribution over file size (Section G.2). In Table 7, we compare the completion accuracy of the Code Llama models to their counterparts prior to long-context fine-tuning. Non-LCFT models fail to generate meaningful completions on long sequences and we thus truncate their prompts to the 4,000 tokens immediate preceding the line to complete. Across all metrics, models fine-tuned to handle long contexts achieve significantly higher performance. This demonstrates that long contexts are informative for code completion, and that with LCFT our models are able to leverage this information to improve their generations. We note that the longest example’s prompt in this test consists of 103K tokens, for which all Code Llama models generate syntactically correct completions, with the 7B model producing an exact match.
items.zh: 最后，我们在单行代码完成任务中测试了处理长上下文大小的能力的好处。我们的任务基于长代码完成（LCC）基准（Guo等人，2023）。222注意，LCC数据点包含在我们的代码训练数据中。LCC测试集偏向于较短的文件，因此我们从LCC的验证集和测试集中抽取了一组新示例，这些示例在文件大小上具有均衡分布（第G.2节）。在表7中，我们将Code Llama模型的完成准确率与长上下文微调之前的对应模型进行了比较。非LCFT模型无法在长序列上生成有意义的完成，因此我们将其提示截断为要完成的行的前4,000个token。在所有指标上，经过微调以处理长上下文的模型实现了显著更高的性能。这表明长上下文对代码完成具有信息性，并且通过LCFT，我们的模型能够利用这些信息来改进其生成。我们注意到，此测试中最长示例的提示包含103K个token，所有Code Llama模型都生成了语法正确的完成，其中7B模型产生了精确匹配。

items.en: While our models are effective on long sequences, we observe that LCFT slightly hurts performance on standard code synthesis benchmarks consisting of short sequences. In Table 10, we observe an average decrease of 0.52 percentage points on HumanEval pass@1 and 1.9 points on MBPP for the pass@1 metric. Similarly, a breakdown of the code completion results in Table 7 by the number of tokens in each example shows that for prompts shorter than 4k tokens, long context fine-tuning induces a reduction of up to 2 BLEU points from base models after code training (Figure 9(b)). We observe similar decreases in performance for infilling tasks (Table 14).
items.zh: 尽管我们的模型在长序列上有效，但我们观察到LCFT在由短序列组成的标准代码合成基准上略微损害了性能。在表10中，我们观察到HumanEval pass@1平均下降0.52个百分点，MBPP pass@1下降1.9个百分点。类似地，表7中按每个示例的token数量对代码完成结果进行的细分显示，对于短于4k token的提示，长上下文微调导致代码训练后基础模型的BLEU分数最多降低2分（图9(b)）。我们在填充任务中观察到类似的性能下降（表14）。

items.en: LCFT comes at a cost for short sequences, and slightly decreases our scores on standard coding benchmarks such as HumanEval and MBPP. However, many real-world use cases are not captured by these benchmarks, and we believe that this cost is more than offset by the potential of handling long sequences for real downstream applications. Hence we opt to release all our Code Llama, Code Llama - Python and Code Llama - Instruct models with long-context capabilities.
items.zh: LCFT对短序列有代价，并略微降低了我们在HumanEval和MBPP等标准编码基准上的分数。然而，许多现实世界的用例并未被这些基准所涵盖，我们相信这一代价远远被处理长序列对实际下游应用的潜力所抵消。因此，我们选择发布所有具有长上下文能力的Code Llama、Code Llama - Python和Code Llama - Instruct模型。

items.en: Code Llama is based on the Llama 2 models, which are trained on 2T tokens of text, including only 80B tokens of code. We tune these models on 500B extra tokens, consisting mostly of code (85%). Figure 5(a) shows the training curves of Code Llama.
items.zh: Code Llama 基于 Llama 2 模型，后者在 2T 个文本 token 上训练，其中仅包含 80B 个代码 token。我们使用额外的 500B 个 token（其中 85% 为代码）对这些模型进行微调。图 5(a) 展示了 Code Llama 的训练曲线。

items.en: We compare the 7B parameters model to an identical model trained from scratch on the same data mix (Figure 5(b)). At the end of training, the loss of the model trained from scratch is equal to the loss of Code Llama 7B at about half of its training (with 240B less training tokens). Moreover, this gap becomes larger over time.
items.zh: 我们将 7B 参数模型与在相同数据混合上从头训练的相同模型进行比较（图 5(b)）。在训练结束时，从头训练的模型的损失等于 Code Llama 7B 在约一半训练量（少 240B 训练 token）时的损失。此外，这一差距随时间推移而扩大。

items.en: We evaluate Code Llama - Instruct and compare it to Llama 2-Chat for coding tasks and helpfulness (Figure 5(c)). We observe that Code Llama improves its coding abilities for each model sizes, while preserving the general helpfulness performance inherited from Llama 2. The results on the helpfulness axis is an indication that Code Llama performs greatly on general instructions following. But we emphasize that this result should be taken with a grain of salt, since we limited our automatic evaluation to scoring the models answers with Llama 2 reward model.
items.zh: 我们评估了 Code Llama - Instruct，并将其与 Llama 2-Chat 在编码任务和有用性方面进行比较（图 5(c)）。我们观察到，Code Llama 在每个模型规模下都提升了编码能力，同时保留了从 Llama 2 继承的通用有用性性能。有用性轴上的结果表明 Code Llama 在遵循通用指令方面表现优异。但我们强调，这一结果应谨慎对待，因为我们仅使用 Llama 2 奖励模型对模型答案进行评分，限制了自动评估的范围。

items.en: We also perform ablations, showing the value of the self-instruct data that we generate with our own model. To evaluate the capacity of the model to answer questions, we use a zero-shot version of MBPP. We prompt the model to generate the code between [PYTHON] and [/PYTHON] tags to make it easy to parse the result. Our exact prompt is shown in Figure 13 in the Appendix. Table 8 show the impact of training on data generated using our models and filtered with unit tests as described in Section 2.5. The self-instruct data allows us to improve our scores on benchmarks such as HumanEval and MBPP. It also makes the training more reliable. With self-instruct, the model easily learns to follow the format requested for MBPP zero-shot while it sometimes fails without it.
items.zh: 我们还进行了消融实验，展示了使用我们自身模型生成的自我指令数据的价值。为了评估模型回答问题的能力，我们使用了 MBPP 的零样本版本。我们提示模型在 [PYTHON] 和 [/PYTHON] 标签之间生成代码，以便于解析结果。具体提示如附录图 13 所示。表 8 展示了使用我们模型生成并经单元测试过滤（如第 2.5 节所述）的数据进行训练的影响。自我指令数据使我们能够提高在 HumanEval 和 MBPP 等基准上的得分，也使训练更加可靠。使用自我指令数据，模型容易学会遵循 MBPP 零样本所需的格式，而无需自我指令时有时会失败。

items.en: For comparison purposes, we also finetuned Code Llama - Python 34B on 15,000 unnatural instructions similarly to Honovich et al. (2023) using the same prompts as for the self-instruct dataset. We do not release this model, but we observe clear improvements on HumanEval and MBPP which are indicative of the improvements that can be reached with a small set of high-quality coding data. The results of the unnatural model are shown in Table 2.
items.zh: 为了比较，我们还按照 Honovich 等人（2023）的方法，使用与自我指令数据集相同的提示，在 15,000 条非自然指令上微调了 Code Llama - Python 34B。我们未发布此模型，但观察到 HumanEval 和 MBPP 上的明显改进，这表明通过少量高质量编码数据即可实现改进。非自然模型的结果如表 2 所示。

items.en: We study the effect of the sampling temperature on the pass@k performance. Specifically, we report pass@1, 10, and 100 using temperature ∈{0.1,0.4,0.6,0.8}absent0.10.40.60.8\in\{0.1,0.4,0.6,0.8\} on both HumanEval and MBPP. Results are depicted in Figure 6. As expected, as we increase the temperature, the pass@1 scores are getting worse while the pass@10 and pass@100 improve.
items.zh: 我们研究了采样温度对 pass@k 性能的影响。具体来说，我们在 HumanEval 和 MBPP 上使用温度 ∈ {0.1, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8} 报告了 pass@1、10 和 100。结果如图 6 所示。正如预期，随着温度升高，pass@1 得分下降，而 pass@10 和 pass@100 得分提高。

full.secZh: 4 负责任的人工智能与安全

items.en: Large language models have been shown to have the potential to produce known falsehoods due to misconceptions or false beliefs (Lin et al., 2022), generate toxic or offensive content (Hartvigsen et al., 2022) and reproduce or even amplify the biases that are contained in the training data (Dhamala et al., 2021). As mentioned in Section 2.5, we make Code Llama - Instruct safer by fine-tuning on outputs from Llama 2, including adversarial prompts with safe responses, as well as prompts addressing code-specific risks.
items.zh: 大型语言模型已被证明可能因误解或错误信念而产生已知的虚假信息（Lin 等人，2022），生成有毒或冒犯性内容（Hartvigsen 等人，2022），并再现甚至放大训练数据中包含的偏见（Dhamala 等人，2021）。如第 2.5 节所述，我们通过微调 Llama 2 的输出（包括带有安全响应的对抗性提示以及针对代码特定风险的提示）使 Code Llama - Instruct 更安全。

items.en: In this section, we perform evaluations on three widely-used automatic safety benchmarks from the perspectives of truthfulness, toxicity, and bias, respectively. Specifically, we assess the safety capabilities of both pretrained Code Llama and fine-tuned Code Llama - Instruct with Falcon (Almazrouei et al., 2023), MPT (MosaicML, 2023), and StarCoder (Li et al., 2023). Although we have chosen certain standard benchmarks commonly used in the language model community to highlight some of the problems with these models, it’s important to note that these evaluations alone do not provide a comprehensive understanding of the risks associated with them. We complement the safety analysis of Code Llama - Instruct with additional red teaming from various domain experts in offensive security, malware development, responsible AI and software engineering, similar to Touvron et al. (2023b).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们分别从真实性、毒性和偏见三个角度，使用三个广泛使用的自动安全基准进行评估。具体来说，我们评估了预训练的 Code Llama 和微调的 Code Llama - Instruct 与 Falcon（Almazrouei 等人，2023）、MPT（MosaicML，2023）和 StarCoder（Li 等人，2023）的安全能力。尽管我们选择了语言模型社区中常用的某些标准基准来突出这些模型的一些问题，但需要注意的是，这些评估本身并不能全面理解与之相关的风险。我们通过来自不同领域专家（包括攻击性安全、恶意软件开发、负责任 AI 和软件工程）的额外红队测试来补充 Code Llama - Instruct 的安全分析，类似于 Touvron 等人（2023b）的做法。

items.en: We use TruthfulQA (Lin et al., 2022) to gauge the factuality and common sense of our models. The TruthfulQA benchmark comprises 817 questions spread across 38 categories, encompassing topics such as health, finance, law, and politics (Lin et al., 2022). The questions are designed to be challenging, even for humans, causing them to answer incorrectly due to unfounded beliefs or misconceptions. To evaluate the generated outputs from LLMs, we utilize GPT-3-based metrics following Lin et al. (2022) to determine the truthfulness and informativeness of the outputs. For the QA prompt, we use a few-shot prompt containing 6 random QA pairs, structured according to the InstructGPT format (Ouyang et al., 2022). The results are reported as the percentage of generations that are both truthful and informative, as well as the percentage that are either truthful or informative.
items.zh: 我们使用 TruthfulQA（Lin 等人，2022）来衡量模型的事实性和常识。TruthfulQA 基准包含 817 个问题，涵盖 38 个类别，涉及健康、金融、法律和政治等主题（Lin 等人，2022）。这些问题设计得具有挑战性，即使对人类也是如此，会因无根据的信念或误解而导致错误回答。为了评估 LLM 生成的输出，我们遵循 Lin 等人（2022）的方法，使用基于 GPT-3 的指标来确定输出的真实性和信息量。对于 QA 提示，我们使用包含 6 个随机 QA 对的少样本提示，结构遵循 InstructGPT 格式（Ouyang 等人，2022）。结果报告为既真实又有信息的生成百分比，以及真实或有信息的生成百分比。

items.en: We use ToxiGen (Hartvigsen et al., 2022) to quantify the extent of toxic language and hate speech generation across various demographic groups. The ToxiGen dataset contains implicitly toxic and benign sentences mentioning 13 minority groups. Following Touvron et al. (2023b), we utilize an improved version of the dataset, which minimizes noise by removing prompts with disagreements among annotators regarding the target demographic group. To measure the toxicity of the generated outputs from each of the LLMs, we employ the default ToxiGen classifier, tuned on RoBERTa (Liu et al., 2019).
items.zh: 我们使用 ToxiGen（Hartvigsen 等人，2022）来量化不同人口群体中有毒语言和仇恨言论的生成程度。ToxiGen 数据集包含提及 13 个少数群体的隐含有毒和良性句子。遵循 Touvron 等人（2023b）的做法，我们使用该数据集的改进版本，通过移除注释者在目标人口群体上存在分歧的提示来最小化噪声。为了衡量每个 LLM 生成输出的毒性，我们使用默认的 ToxiGen 分类器，该分类器基于 RoBERTa 微调（Liu 等人，2019）。

items.en: We employ the Bias in Open-Ended Language Generation Dataset (BOLD) (Dhamala et al., 2021) to investigate how the sentiment in the model’s outputs may differ based on demographic attributes. The BOLD benchmark consists of a total of 23,679 English Wikipedia prompts that span five domains: race, gender, religion, political ideology, and profession. These prompts cover 43 different subgroups. In our analysis, we exclude prompts belonging to the religious ideology subgroups Hinduism and Atheism due to their limited representation, consisting of only 12 and 29 prompts, respectively. To assess the sentiments conveyed by the combination of the prompt prefix and model generation, we employ sentiment analysis using the Valence Aware Dictionary and Sentiment Reasoner (VADER) (Hutto & Gilbert, 2014). The VADER produces sentiment scores between -1 and 1, where a positive (negative) score indicates a positive (negative) sentiment towards the population mentioned in the prompt. A score closer to 0 indicates a neutral sentiment.
items.zh: 我们使用开放式语言生成中的偏见数据集（BOLD）（Dhamala 等人，2021）来研究模型输出的情感如何因人口属性而异。BOLD 基准包含总共 23,679 个英文维基百科提示，涵盖五个领域：种族、性别、宗教、政治意识形态和职业。这些提示覆盖 43 个不同的子组。在我们的分析中，我们排除了属于宗教意识形态子组印度教和无神论的提示，因为它们的代表性有限，分别只有 12 个和 29 个提示。为了评估提示前缀和模型生成组合所传达的情感，我们使用情感分析工具 VADER（Hutto & Gilbert, 2014）。VADER 产生介于 -1 和 1 之间的情感分数，其中正（负）分数表示对提示中提及的人群的正面（负面）情感。分数接近 0 表示中性情感。

items.en: It is important to also proactively identify risks with adversarial testing or red teaming. We conducted 3 red teaming exercises with 25 Meta employees, including domain experts in responsible AI, malware development, and offensive security engineering.
items.zh: 通过对抗性测试或红队测试主动识别风险也很重要。我们与 25 名 Meta 员工进行了 3 次红队测试，包括负责任 AI、恶意软件开发和攻击性安全工程领域的专家。

items.en: The red teamers provided a nuanced evaluation specifically on the risk from so called “dual intent prompts.” Dual intent prompts are requests for help with writing code that could be used maliciously but the prompt does not directly address the topic (example “Mosaic Prompts” Glukhov et al. (2023)). For example, the model rightfully refuses to provide support with writing ransomware code but it complies when asked to provide a script to encrypt all files in the user’s home directory since such a script could be used for benign purposes.
items.zh: 红队成员对所谓的“双重意图提示”带来的风险进行了细致评估。双重意图提示是指请求帮助编写可能被恶意使用的代码，但提示并未直接涉及该主题（例如“马赛克提示” Glukhov 等人（2023））。例如，模型会合理拒绝提供编写勒索软件代码的支持，但当被要求提供加密用户主目录中所有文件的脚本时，它会遵从，因为这样的脚本可能用于良性目的。

items.en: After conducting red team exercises, we asked participants (who had also participated in Llama 2 Chat exercises) to also provide qualitative assessment of safety capabilities of the model. Some participants who had expertise in offensive security and malware development questioned the ultimate risk posed by “malicious code generation” through LLMs with current capabilities.
items.zh: 在进行红队测试后，我们要求参与者（他们也参与了 Llama 2 Chat 测试）对模型的安全能力提供定性评估。一些具有攻击性安全和恶意软件开发专业知识的参与者质疑当前能力下 LLM 通过“恶意代码生成”带来的最终风险。

items.en: One red teamer remarked, “While LLMs being able to iteratively improve on produced source code is a risk, producing source code isn’t the actual gap. That said, LLMs may be risky because they can inform low-skill adversaries in production of scripts through iteration that perform some malicious behavior.”
items.zh: 一位红队成员评论道：“虽然LLM能够迭代改进生成的源代码是一种风险，但生成源代码本身并非真正的差距。尽管如此，LLM可能具有风险，因为它们可以通过迭代告知低技能对手生成执行某些恶意行为的脚本。”

items.en: According to another red teamer, “[v]arious scripts, program code, and compiled binaries are readily available on mainstream public websites, hacking forums or on ‘the dark web.’ Advanced malware development is beyond the current capabilities of available LLMs, and even an advanced LLM paired with an expert malware developer is not particularly useful- as the barrier is not typically writing the malware code itself. That said, these LLMs may produce code which will get easily caught if used directly.”
items.zh: 据另一位红队成员称，“各种脚本、程序代码和编译后的二进制文件在主流公共网站、黑客论坛或‘暗网’上很容易获得。高级恶意软件开发超出了当前可用LLM的能力，即使将高级LLM与专家恶意软件开发者配对也不是特别有用——因为障碍通常不在于编写恶意软件代码本身。也就是说，这些LLM生成的代码如果直接使用，很容易被检测到。”

items.en: In addition to red teaming sessions, we ran a quantitative evaluation on risk from generating malicious code by scoring Code Llama’s responses to ChatGPT’s (GPT3.5 Turbo) with LLAMAv2 70B’s safety reward model. For this second quantitative evaluation, we selected prompts that the red teamers generated specifically attempting to solicit malicious code (even though the red teaming included consideration of a broad set of safety risks). These prompts were a mix of clear intent and slightly obfuscated intentions (see some examples in Figure 16. We show a KDE plot of the distribution of the safety score for all models in Figure 7). We observe that Code Llama tends to answer with safer responses; the distribution of safety scores for Code Llama has more weight in the safer part of the range.
items.zh: 除了红队测试环节，我们还通过使用Code Llama对ChatGPT（GPT3.5 Turbo）的响应进行评分，并采用LLAMAv2 70B的安全奖励模型，对生成恶意代码的风险进行了定量评估。在这第二次定量评估中，我们选择了红队成员专门为尝试获取恶意代码而生成的提示（尽管红队测试考虑了广泛的安全风险）。这些提示混合了明确意图和略微模糊的意图（参见图16中的一些示例。我们在图7中展示了所有模型安全评分分布的KDE图）。我们观察到Code Llama倾向于给出更安全的响应；Code Llama的安全评分分布在更安全的部分权重更大。

items.capEn: Figure 7: KDE plot of the risk score output by the Llama 2 safety reward model on prompts with clear intent specific to code risk created by red teamers with background in cybersecurity and malware generation.
items.capZh: 图7：Llama 2安全奖励模型对红队成员（具有网络安全和恶意软件生成背景）创建的、针对代码风险的明确意图提示输出的风险评分KDE图。

items.en: LLMs that are too safe can have a tendency to over-refuse valid claims similar to what was reported after the release of Llama 2. We specifically asked red teamers to test for this behavior. They found some limited evidence of false refusals (when not using a system preprompt). False refusals could also be solved by rephrasing the prompt e.g. “Can you tell me how to kill a process?” rephrased to “How do I kill a process?”. We show some examples in Appendix Table 15. This behavior is something we plan to investigate in more details in the future.
items.zh: 过于安全的LLM可能倾向于过度拒绝有效请求，类似于Llama 2发布后报告的情况。我们特别要求红队成员测试这种行为。他们发现了一些有限证据表明存在错误拒绝（当不使用系统预提示时）。错误拒绝也可以通过重新表述提示来解决，例如“你能告诉我如何杀死一个进程吗？”重新表述为“我如何杀死一个进程？”。我们在附录表15中展示了一些示例。这种行为我们计划在未来更详细地研究。

items.en: As our instruction finetuning set prioritizes safety, longer finetunings tend to degrade coding performance. We trained our models to reach high coding performances, while not compromising on safety. As shown in Figure 7, our Code Llama - Instruct models are safer than ChatGPT.
items.zh: 由于我们的指令微调集优先考虑安全性，较长的微调往往会降低编码性能。我们训练模型以达到高编码性能，同时不牺牲安全性。如图7所示，我们的Code Llama - Instruct模型比ChatGPT更安全。

items.en: Early observations with LLMs such as GPT-Neo (Black et al., 2021) or GPT-J (Wang & Komatsuzaki, 2021) showed that adding code in the training data makes program synthesis possible even with medium size LLMs. Code from open-source software is now a standard part of the training data for general-purpose LLMs such as PaLM (Chowdhery et al., 2022), Chinchilla (Hoffmann et al., 2022), Gopher (Rae et al., 2021), GPT-4 (OpenAI, 2023), and Llama (Touvron et al., 2023a; b). In parallel, models specifically trained or fine-tuned for code understanding and program synthesis from natural language prompts emerged with LLMs such as Codex (Chen et al., 2021), CodeT5 (Wang et al., 2021), InCoder (Fried et al., 2023), AlphaCode (Li et al., 2022), CodeGen (Nijkamp et al., 2023b) and CodeGen 2 (Nijkamp et al., 2023a), GPT-NeoX (Black et al., 2022), SantaCoder (Allal et al., 2023), StarCoder (Li et al., 2023) and phi-1 (Gunasekar et al., 2023), consistently demonstrating better performance on code benchmarks than general-purpose LLMs of comparable or even larger size. This paper follows this line, by fine-tuning the recent general-purpose language model Llama 2 on code data.
items.zh: 早期对GPT-Neo（Black等人，2021）或GPT-J（Wang & Komatsuzaki，2021）等LLM的观察表明，在训练数据中添加代码使得中等规模的LLM也能实现程序合成。来自开源软件的代码现在已成为PaLM（Chowdhery等人，2022）、Chinchilla（Hoffmann等人，2022）、Gopher（Rae等人，2021）、GPT-4（OpenAI，2023）和Llama（Touvron等人，2023a; b）等通用LLM训练数据的标准部分。与此同时，专门针对代码理解和从自然语言提示进行程序合成进行训练或微调的模型也随之出现，如Codex（Chen等人，2021）、CodeT5（Wang等人，2021）、InCoder（Fried等人，2023）、AlphaCode（Li等人，2022）、CodeGen（Nijkamp等人，2023b）和CodeGen 2（Nijkamp等人，2023a）、GPT-NeoX（Black等人，2022）、SantaCoder（Allal等人，2023）、StarCoder（Li等人，2023）和phi-1（Gunasekar等人，2023），这些模型在代码基准测试上始终表现出比同等甚至更大规模的通用LLM更好的性能。本文遵循这一路线，通过在代码数据上微调最近的通用语言模型Llama 2。

items.en: The landscape of LLMs is marked by whether the technology is free and the code is available for research or commercial use. ChatGPT and GPT-4 (OpenAI, 2023), PaLM (Chowdhery et al., 2022) and Chinchilla (Hoffmann et al., 2022) are closed source, while BLOOM (Scao et al., 2022), OPT (Zhang et al., 2022b), and the seminal work of Llama are public (Touvron et al., 2023a). The more recent Llama 2 has been released under a custom licence for commercial use (Touvron et al., 2023b). A similar dichotomy exists for code models, with Codex/copilot (Chen et al., 2021), AlphaCode (Li et al., 2022), GPT-4 or phi-1 (Gunasekar et al., 2023) being closed source, whereas the recent SantaCoder (Allal et al., 2023) and StarCoder (Li et al., 2023) have been released open-source and allow for commercial use. In this work, we allow for commercial use of the models under the same terms as Llama 2. Moreover, our largest model, with its 70B parameters, is significantly larger than previous open-source models – GPT-NeoX-20B (Black et al., 2022) and StarCoder with 15.5B parameters – which allows it to achieve state-of-the-art performances on HumanEval, MBPP and MultiPL-E among open-source models. – GPT-NeoX-20B (Black et al., 2022) and StarCoder with 15.5B parameters – which allows it to achieve state-of-the-art performances on HumanEval, MBPP and MultiPL-E among open-source models.
items.zh: LLM的格局取决于技术是否免费以及代码是否可用于研究或商业用途。ChatGPT和GPT-4（OpenAI，2023）、PaLM（Chowdhery等人，2022）和Chinchilla（Hoffmann等人，2022）是闭源的，而BLOOM（Scao等人，2022）、OPT（Zhang等人，2022b）以及Llama的开创性工作是公开的（Touvron等人，2023a）。最近的Llama 2已根据商业用途的自定义许可证发布（Touvron等人，2023b）。代码模型也存在类似的二分法，Codex/copilot（Chen等人，2021）、AlphaCode（Li等人，2022）、GPT-4或phi-1（Gunasekar等人，2023）是闭源的，而最近的SantaCoder（Allal等人，2023）和StarCoder（Li等人，2023）已作为开源发布并允许商业使用。在这项工作中，我们允许在Llama 2相同的条款下对模型进行商业使用。此外，我们最大的模型拥有70B参数，显著大于之前的开源模型——GPT-NeoX-20B（Black等人，2022）和拥有15.5B参数的StarCoder——这使得它在开源模型中能够在HumanEval、MBPP和MultiPL-E上达到最先进的性能。

items.en: It is well-known that data quality is critical in the training and responsible development of LLMs (e.g., Hoffmann et al., 2022; Penedo et al., 2023), and this is also true for code as discussed by Allal et al. (2023). Modern models are trained on publicly available, open-source code. In addition, Allamanis (2019) and Allal et al. (2023) discuss the impact of effective deduplication and of selecting code from repositories based on the number of GitHub stars (as a proxy for popularity), while Li et al. (2023) augment their data with GitHub issues and commits collected from BigQuery. Gunasekar et al. (2023) filter data up to only containing “textbook”-quality code and add synthetic problems collected using GPT-3.5, following Jung et al. (2023), in order to obtain good performance on simple benchmarks such as HumanEval and MBPP. We follow the approach of learning from publicly available code only, without additional meta-level or temporal information such as issues or commits. We also do not train our foundation models on additional synthetic exercises, since we did not want to take the risk of reducing the scope of our models to simple coding exercises similar to those contained in HumanEval and MBPP.
items.zh: 众所周知，数据质量对于LLM的训练和负责任开发至关重要（例如，Hoffmann等人，2022；Penedo等人，2023），对于代码也是如此，正如Allal等人（2023）所讨论的。现代模型在公开可用的开源代码上进行训练。此外，Allamanis（2019）和Allal等人（2023）讨论了有效去重以及根据GitHub星数（作为流行度的代理）从仓库中选择代码的影响，而Li等人（2023）则通过从BigQuery收集的GitHub问题和提交来扩充数据。Gunasekar等人（2023）将数据过滤到仅包含“教科书”质量的代码，并添加使用GPT-3.5收集的合成问题，遵循Jung等人（2023）的方法，以便在HumanEval和MBPP等简单基准测试上获得良好性能。我们遵循仅从公开可用代码中学习的方法，不添加额外的元级别或时间信息（如问题或提交）。我们也不在基础模型上训练额外的合成练习，因为我们不想冒将模型范围缩小到类似HumanEval和MBPP中包含的简单编码练习的风险。

items.en: In addition to program synthesis from natural language prompts or infilling (Fried et al., 2023; Bavarian et al., 2022; Li et al., 2023; Nguyen et al., 2023), many tasks related to code understanding or synthesis have been addressed since the early 2020s with NLP models adapted for code (Raffel et al., 2020; Feng et al., 2020; Guo et al., 2021; Wang et al., 2021; Ahmad et al., 2021), also see the survey by Xu & Zhu (2022). These tasks include code summarization, refinement, translation (Rozière et al., 2020; 2021; Szafraniec et al., 2023) fixing bugs (Yasunaga & Liang, 2021; Zhang et al., 2022a; Prenner et al., 2022), fixing build errors (Tarlow et al., 2020) or generating unit tests (Tufano et al., 2020; Li et al., 2022; Chen et al., 2023a), as well as solving math problems as demonstrated by PaLM (Chowdhery et al., 2022) or Codex (Chen et al., 2021). 14 code understanding tasks are represented in the CodeXGlue benchmark (Lu et al., 2021). Here we focused on the main problem of program synthesis, as well as infilling/completion for our 7B and 13B models where the ability comes with little impact on the generation performance as previously observed by Bavarian et al. (2022).
items.zh: 除了从自然语言提示进行程序合成或填充（Fried等人，2023；Bavarian等人，2022；Li等人，2023；Nguyen等人，2023）之外，自2020年代初以来，许多与代码理解或合成相关的任务已通过适用于代码的NLP模型得到解决（Raffel等人，2020；Feng等人，2020；Guo等人，2021；Wang等人，2021；Ahmad等人，2021），另见Xu & Zhu（2022）的综述。这些任务包括代码摘要、改进、翻译（Rozière等人，2020；2021；Szafraniec等人，2023）、修复错误（Yasunaga & Liang，2021；Zhang等人，2022a；Prenner等人，2022）、修复构建错误（Tarlow等人，2020）或生成单元测试（Tufano等人，2020；Li等人，2022；Chen等人，2023a），以及解决数学问题，如PaLM（Chowdhery等人，2022）或Codex（Chen等人，2021）所示。CodeXGlue基准测试（Lu等人，2021）中包含了14个代码理解任务。我们在此重点关注程序合成的主要问题，以及我们7B和13B模型的填充/补全能力，这种能力对生成性能影响很小，正如Bavarian等人（2022）之前观察到的。

items.en: A number of works proposed to incorporate within the training objective structural knowledge of programs, with specialized objectives for code deobfuscation (Lachaux et al., 2021), contrastive learning through semantic-preserving code transformations (Jain et al., 2021), leveraging Abstract Syntax Trees to learn tree-aware positional encodings (Shiv & Quirk, 2019; Peng et al., 2021). A recent stream of work takes into account program execution or unit tests to filter, cluster, or improve the correctness of programs when few candidates must be submitted (Li et al., 2022; Chen et al., 2023a; Le et al., 2022; Zhang et al., 2023), or unit tests them within a reinforcement learning objective to enrich the training signal (Le et al., 2022; Liu et al., 2023a). We focused here on improving the base model rather than tweaking the inference scheme, since we believe this is where most of the long-term progress comes from; it is nonetheless an interesting direction to experiment with more elaborated inference schemes on top of Code Llama.
items.zh: 许多工作提出在训练目标中融入程序的结构知识，包括用于代码反混淆的专门目标（Lachaux等人，2021）、通过语义保持代码变换进行对比学习（Jain等人，2021）、利用抽象语法树学习树感知位置编码（Shiv & Quirk，2019；Peng等人，2021）。最近的一系列工作考虑程序执行或单元测试来过滤、聚类或改进程序的正确性，当必须提交少量候选时（Li等人，2022；Chen等人，2023a；Le等人，2022；Zhang等人，2023），或在强化学习目标中对它们进行单元测试以丰富训练信号（Le等人，2022；Liu等人，2023a）。我们在此专注于改进基础模型，而不是调整推理方案，因为我们相信这是长期进步的主要来源；尽管如此，在Code Llama之上尝试更复杂的推理方案是一个有趣的方向。

items.en: Scaling Transformers and LLMs to long input sequences has attracted much recent interest (Dai et al., 2019; Beltagy et al., 2020; Yu et al., 2023; Ding et al., 2023). The context lengths supported by available models and APIs has seen a steady increase, with StarCoder being trained on 8K token sequences ((Li et al., 2023), up from the 4K of Allal et al. (2023)), recent GPT versions supporting 16K (gpt-3.5-turbo-16k) and 32K tokens (gpt-4-32k), MPT-7b fine-tuned on 65K tokens (MosaicML, 2023), and Claude featuring 100K context windows (Anthropic, 2023). Previous research focuses on alleviating the O​(n2)𝑂superscript𝑛2O(n^{2}) space and time complexity of self-attention (Vaswani et al., 2017) by introducing sparsity patterns, as well as by encoding positional information in such a way that models can leverage input sizes larger than those presented at training time (length extrapolation). In our work, we do not rely on hand-crafted sparsity patterns such as those proposed for code input by Guo et al. (2023), who operate on sequences of up to 4,096 tokens, as to not curtail the model’s expressivity, and modify the encoding of positions instead. Starting from pretrained Llama 2 models that utilize RoPE (Su et al., 2021), Chen et al. (2023b) propose additional fine-tuning for long sequence handling, an approach we pursue as well. However, we tailor our hyper-parameter modifications to allow for extrapolation at inference time. Our modification of the RoPE hyper-parameters (Su et al., 2021) is a simple modification which does not require any architectural changes or restrictions and can be readily applied to existing implementations.333Concurrently to our work, the approach of increasing the rotation frequency base value has been proposed by user “bloc97” in the “LocalLLaMA” subreddit (https://redd.it/14lz7j5), where it was applied to LLaMA models without further fine-tuning. Press et al. (2022) propose a linear bias for attacking extrapolation; in contrast, our approach seeks to reduce existing bias towards shot-range attention. Recent work suggests that causal models do not require an explicit encoding of position information (Haviv et al., 2022; Kazemnejad et al., 2023), a hypothesis we did not test in this work as we demonstrated that starting from pretrained Llama 2 models is significantly more efficient than training from scratch.
items.zh: 将Transformer和LLM扩展到长输入序列最近引起了广泛关注（Dai等人，2019；Beltagy等人，2020；Yu等人，2023；Ding等人，2023）。可用模型和API支持的上下文长度稳步增长，StarCoder在8K令牌序列上训练（（Li等人，2023），高于Allal等人（2023）的4K），最近的GPT版本支持16K（gpt-3.5-turbo-16k）和32K令牌（gpt-4-32k），MPT-7b在65K令牌上微调（MosaicML，2023），以及Claude拥有100K上下文窗口（Anthropic，2023）。先前的研究侧重于通过引入稀疏性模式来缓解自注意力的O(n²)空间和时间复杂度（Vaswani等人，2017），以及通过编码位置信息使模型能够利用比训练时更大的输入大小（长度外推）。在我们的工作中，我们不依赖手工制作的稀疏性模式，例如Guo等人（2023）为代码输入提出的模式（他们在最多4,096个令牌的序列上操作），以免削弱模型的表达能力，而是修改位置的编码。从使用RoPE（Su等人，2021）的预训练Llama 2模型开始，Chen等人（2023b）提出了用于长序列处理的额外微调，我们也采用了这种方法。然而，我们调整了超参数修改，以允许在推理时进行外推。我们对RoPE超参数（Su等人，2021）的修改是一个简单的修改，不需要任何架构更改或限制，并且可以轻松应用于现有实现。³³³与我们的工作同时，增加旋转频率基值的方法由用户“bloc97”在“LocalLLaMA”子reddit（https://redd.it/14lz7j5）上提出，并应用于LLaMA模型而无需进一步微调。Press等人（2022）提出了一种用于攻击外推的线性偏置；相比之下，我们的方法旨在减少对短程注意力的现有偏置。最近的研究表明，因果模型不需要显式编码位置信息（Haviv等人，2022；Kazemnejad等人，2023），我们在本工作中没有测试这一假设，因为我们证明了从预训练的Llama 2模型开始比从头训练效率高得多。

items.en: We release a family of code-specialized Llama 2 models called Code Llama, with three main variants that we release with four sizes (7B, 13B, 34B, and 70B parameters): Code Llama, Code Llama - Python, Code Llama - Instruct. With real-world applications in mind, we trained our 7B, 13B, and 70B models to support infilling, and all our models to leverage large contexts. We tested their stability in inference up to 100K tokens (Figure 4(a)). Large context fine-tuning and infilling come at a cost on standard benchmarks left-to-right code generation benchmarks (Table 10), that are all based on short sequences (i.e. function level). Still, our 70B model is state-of-the-art among public models on standard python completion benchmarks, and our other models are competitive compared to models with similar numbers of parameters. On multilingual benchmarks, even our smallest model (Code Llama 7B) outperforms every other public model.
items.zh: 我们发布了一系列代码专用的Llama 2模型，称为Code Llama，包含三个主要变体，我们以四种规模（7B、13B、34B和70B参数）发布：Code Llama、Code Llama - Python、Code Llama - Instruct。考虑到实际应用，我们训练了7B、13B和70B模型以支持填充，并训练所有模型以利用大上下文。我们测试了它们在推理时高达100K令牌的稳定性（图4(a)）。大上下文微调和填充在标准从左到右代码生成基准测试（表10）上会带来成本，这些基准测试都基于短序列（即函数级别）。尽管如此，我们的70B模型在标准Python补全基准测试中在公共模型中是最先进的，而我们的其他模型与具有相似参数数量的模型相比具有竞争力。在多语言基准测试中，即使我们最小的模型（Code Llama 7B）也优于所有其他公共模型。

items.en: The Code Llama - Instruct models are trained to provide zero-shot instruction ability to Code Llama. In this further fine-tuning, where we somewhat distillate Llama 2-Chat, we focused not only on being more directly helpful (Figure 5(c)) but also sought to provide a safer model to use and deploy (Section 4). Following instruction and being overly safe can cost some points on evaluations (e.g. on HumanEval for the 34B model in Table 2), as exemplified in Figure 15. Further work is needed for LLMs to understand context and nuance in their instructions.
items.zh: Code Llama - Instruct模型经过训练，为Code Llama提供零样本指令能力。在这次进一步微调中，我们一定程度上蒸馏了Llama 2-Chat，不仅专注于更直接地提供帮助（图5(c)），还力求提供更安全的使用和部署模型（第4节）。遵循指令和过度安全可能会在评估中损失一些分数（例如，表2中34B模型在HumanEval上的表现），如图15所示。LLM需要进一步的工作来理解其指令中的上下文和细微差别。
